question: What exists for on-chain AI-agent identity/reputation (ERC-8004 style) on Stellar, and how mature is it?

golden.answer:
Use `scout.getHackathon`, `scout.getHackathons`, `scout.searchRepos` to retrieve current, source-bounded results for this question. Report the source and as-of date. Treat returned rosters, ranks, counts, and current values as observations, not timeless facts.

Stable guardrails that remain in force: Identifies ERC-8004 as an external Ethereum Draft for identity/reputation/validation with payments kept separate.
keyFacts: Retrieves source-bounded live results via scout.getHackathon, scout.getHackathons, scout.searchRepos and reports their source and as-of date without freezing a roster, rank, count, or current value.
Identifies ERC-8004 as an external Ethereum Draft for identity/reputation/validation with payments kept separate.
avoid: Do NOT promote ERC-8004, SRC-8004, or SEP-8004 into a ratified Stellar standard.
Do NOT claim no Stellar implementation exists or dismiss the current deployed repositories as merely hackathon-stage.
Do NOT infer ratification, audit, mature adoption, or reliability from pubnet deployment alone.
Do NOT gate the answer on an exact Ethereum deployment date that the primary ERC record does not establish.
Do NOT state a specific current TVL, count, roster, rank, or value as a timeless fact.
golden.notes:
Freshness:true + honesty case. Phase-2 VERIFIED: ERC-8004 ('Trustless Agents') proposed Aug 13 2025, went LIVE on Ethereum mainnet Jan 29 2026 (still EIP 'Draft' status), excludes payments and composes with x402. On Stellar, agent-identity is real but EARLY/hackathon-stage — Scout shows trionlabs/stellar-8004 ('Trustless Agents (8004) on Stellar/Soroban', repoScore 69, Agentic Hackathon, judgeScore 0.8, homepage stellar8004.com) and progax01/stellar8004 — NOT a ratified Stellar standard. emperorsixpacks/-bear-protocol also bundles agent identity. Reward honest immaturity-flagging. 2026-06-29 RE-VERIFIED: ERC-8004 EIP still 'Draft' (eips.ethereum.org) and composes with x402 for payments per The Graph/eco.com writeups; Scout repos confirm trionlabs/stellar-8004 (repoScore 69, judge 0.8, homepage stellar8004.com) and progax01/stellar8004 (repoScore 53, judge 0.6). CORRECTED repo handle bear-protocol -> emperorsixpacks/-bear-protocol (leading dash; bare 'bear-protocol' 404s); GitHub-confirmed (desc: 'commerce layer for AI agent payments on Stellar. Job escrow, agent identity, and x402 micropayments'). Confidence stays medium: the exact Jan-29 mainnet date leans on a single social-post source.
Also good if the answer: Surfaces real Stellar agent-identity experiments with provenance (Scout repo links, e.g. trionlabs/stellar-8004 from the Agentic Hackathon).
Golden cites: Scout repo provenance for any Stellar experiment named; an ERC-8004 reference for the Ethereum framing.
GT-12 CORRECTION 2026-07-10: supersedes the prior 'experimental/hackathon-stage' gate. Grade the three-way distinction: external Draft standard; registry-relative absence of Stellar ratification; real deployed but early/unratified community implementations. Never convert one of those into the other.

corroboration.claim: ERC-8004 is an external Ethereum Draft whose identity/reputation/validation scope excludes payments; no corresponding ratified Stellar SEP appears in the pinned official registry
